lessons.lesson: When task specifies expected_file:<filename>, create that exact filename. Wrong filename = fail regardless of code correctness.
lessons.context: Benchmark showed 5+ failures due to filename mismatch despite passing tests

gaps.description: Agent consistently creates wrong filename when task specifies exact filename. Examples: expected async_processor.py -> created nested_callbacks_async.py, expected validators.py -> created validation.py

patterns.trigger: Task specifies expected_filename in validator but agent ignores it
patterns.impact: Causes objective validation failure despite passing tests

evolutions.improvement: Added Task Validators Are Law section to Gotchas

evolutions.description: New skill for enforcing task validator rules (filename, function name, test command)
